message:
✨ Add feedback GitHub token settings support (supersedes #2215) (#2414)

* Add settings support for feedback GitHub token

Signed-off-by: yblzhua <1963225049730818048+yblzhua@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address review feedback for feedback GitHub token PR

- Replace hardcoded English strings with i18n t() calls in feedback
  token section (label, description, buttons, rate limit)
- Add i18n keys to en/common.json under settings.github namespace
- Fix early return logic in loadToken: only skip backend fetch when
  BOTH tokens are in localStorage, not when either one exists
- Wire LoadFeedbackConfigFromEnv() in server.go so UI-configured
  feedback tokens are used (was dead code before)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix feedback token dynamic refresh and add dismissal flag

- Add getEffectiveToken() method to FeedbackHandler that dynamically reads
  from settings manager on each request instead of using a static startup value
- Add STORAGE_KEY_FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN_DISMISSED for persistent env-token
  dismissal, preventing cleared env-sourced tokens from reappearing
- Fix loadToken to respect dismissal flags for both main and feedback tokens,
  preventing env-sourced tokens from being rehydrated after user clears them
- Fix restoreToLocalStorage to remove stale feedback token entries when absent
  from backend settings
- Fix i18n feedbackTokenEnvSource leading space — handle spacing in JSX instead
- Rename LoadFeedbackConfigFromEnv to LoadFeedbackConfig to reflect that it
  now prefers persisted settings with env fallback

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: yblzhua <1963225049730818048+yblzhua@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: yblzhua <1963225049730818048+yblzhua@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -723,12 +723,8 @@ func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
 	api.Delete("/cluster-groups/:name", workloadHandlers.DeleteClusterGroup)
 
 	// Feature requests and feedback routes
-	feedback := handlers.NewFeedbackHandler(s.store, handlers.FeedbackConfig{
-		GitHubToken:   s.config.FeedbackGitHubToken,
-		WebhookSecret: s.config.GitHubWebhookSecret,
-		RepoOwner:     s.config.FeedbackRepoOwner,
-		RepoName:      s.config.FeedbackRepoName,
-	})
+	feedbackCfg := handlers.LoadFeedbackConfig()
+	feedback := handlers.NewFeedbackHandler(s.store, feedbackCfg)
 	api.Post("/feedback/requests", feedback.CreateFeatureRequest)
 	api.Get("/feedback/requests", feedback.ListFeatureRequests)
 	api.Get("/feedback/queue", feedback.ListAllFeatureRequests)

@@ -11,6 +11,9 @@ export const STORAGE_KEY_AUTH_TOKEN = 'auth_token' // used by notification API
 export const STORAGE_KEY_GITHUB_TOKEN = 'github_token'
 export const STORAGE_KEY_GITHUB_TOKEN_SOURCE = 'github_token_source'
 export const STORAGE_KEY_GITHUB_TOKEN_DISMISSED = 'github_token_dismissed'
+export const STORAGE_KEY_FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN = 'feedback_github_token'
+export const STORAGE_KEY_FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN_SOURCE = 'feedback_github_token_source'
+export const STORAGE_KEY_FEEDBACK_GITHUB_TOKEN_DISMISSED = 'ksc-feedback-github-token-dismissed'
 export const DEMO_TOKEN_VALUE = 'demo-token'
 
 // ── Demo / Onboarding ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

@@ -75,8 +75,11 @@ export interface AllSettings {
   // Sensitive (decrypted in transit over localhost)
   apiKeys: Record<string, APIKeyEntry>
   githubToken: string
+  feedbackGithubToken?: string
   notifications: NotificationSecrets
 
-  /** Where the GitHub token came from: "settings" (user UI), "env" (.env file), or undefined */
+  /** Where the main GitHub token came from: "settings" (user UI), "env" (.env file), or undefined */
   githubTokenSource?: 'settings' | 'env'
+  /** Where the feedback GitHub token came from: "settings" (user UI), "env" (.env file), or undefined */
+  feedbackGithubTokenSource?: 'settings' | 'env'
 }
